creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next breakfast date. ⬇️

📍 @mazmicafe in Bur Dubai Souk
☕️ it’s an Italian cafe with a touch of Arabic culture. The indoor dining area is rustic and homey. However, the outdoor seating is the perfect place for a morning meal especially this winter season. It’s right at the bank of Dubai Creek, so you can dine and relax while watching the traditional abras oass by. 
🍳 They serve all day breakfast. Menu is reasonably priced; most dishes are at 45 AED., coffee at 20 AED. We had Eggs Benedict, Shakshouka, cappuccino and latte.

Tag your breakfast date.

Old Dubai • Mazmi Cafe • Dubai Cafe • Dubai Restaurant • Dubai Creek • Lady and her Sweet Escapes • #DubaiCafe

transcription.text: I can see the sunlight of the sky in the morning Something that I know just feels so right
